goal: 实现 real-profile UAT 命令

summary.title: 增加 real-profile UAT 命令
summary.what: 将 release smoke 脚本抽成可复用 runReleaseSmoke/CLI 参数解析，支持 artifact、extension-dir、user-data-dir、keep-profile 和 scenario；新增 release:uat:real-profile 命令，从默认 external submission artifact 解压加载并要求显式 profile；同步 release packet 文档和 CLI 解析测试。
summary.why: 当前 cutover delivery 的剩余边界是外部 submission 或一次真实 profile UAT；把 UAT 从文档步骤变成可执行命令，可以推进交付而不是继续拆 deferred breadth。
summary.user_goal: 实现 real-profile UAT 命令

decisions.chose: 用 release:uat:real-profile 包装既有 release smoke 代表性流程，并默认加载 external submission zip
decisions.rationale: 保持与已接受的自动化 MV3 smoke 同构，同时验证实际交付 artifact 路径。
rejected: 新增一套独立 UAT 断言流程
重新实现 release smoke 的安装、启用、事件和 audit 校验逻辑

decisions.chose: real-profile UAT 必须传 --user-data-dir，并保留该 profile 目录
decisions.rationale: 真实 profile 应由决策者显式选择，命令不应该隐式覆盖或删除人类提供的浏览器 profile。

decisions.chose: 支持 --artifact 解压 zip 到临时 unpacked extension，再在 finally 清理临时目录
decisions.rationale: UAT 应覆盖外部 submission artifact，而不是只覆盖本地 dist 目录。

review_notes: 验证通过：targeted Vitest 2 files / 4 tests、Biome focused check、standalone release:smoke:mv3、artifact-backed release:uat:real-profile、bun run check、bun run release:acceptance。
首次 release:acceptance 暴露脚本被测试导入后缺少 chrome ambient type；已改为 page context 内 globalThis 类型断言并重跑通过。

architectural_claims: cutover delivery remains focused on external submission / one real-profile UAT; no deferred product breadth is reopened
behavioral_changes: release smoke can now run against a caller-provided extension directory, release artifact zip, and/or user data dir
release:uat:real-profile requires --user-data-dir, defaults to the external submission artifact, tags output as real-profile-uat, and preserves the provided profile
security_implications: No new extension permissions; real-profile path is explicit and artifact extraction uses a temporary directory that is cleaned up.
migration_notes: No persisted data migration; release submission packet now documents the executable UAT command.
